Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
$file = ''D:\\RetailEX\\src\\components\\wms\\components\\AllWMSModules.tsx''
$content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
Write-Host \(''File length: '' + $content.Length\)
Write-Host \(''CountingModule found: '' + $content.Contains\(''CountingModule''\)\)
$idx = $content.IndexOf\(''export function CountingModule''\)
Write-Host \(''Index of CountingModule: '' + $idx\)
")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd D:\\RetailEX && node -e ""const ts = require\(''./node_modules/typescript''\); const prog = ts.createProgram\([''src/components/wms/components/StockCountModule.tsx'', ''src/services/wmsStockCount.ts''], {strict: false, skipLibCheck: true}\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(prog\); diags.forEach\(d => console.log\(ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, ''\\n''\)\)\);"" 2>&1")
